faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at ISTS Women's Engineering College?
faqs.answer: ISTS Women's Engineering College offers Degree courses including 4 UG course. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. ISTS Women's Engineering College has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering.

faqs.question: Which courses does ISTS Women's Engineering College offer to students?
faqs.answer: ISTS Women's Engineering College has courses such as B.Tech to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering. ISTS Women's Engineering College has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering.

faqs.question: How can I get into ISTS Women's Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
ISTS Women's Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidates should have completed 17 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023) and an upper age limit is 22 years for all the candidates and 25 years in respect of SC/ST candidates as on 31st December of the year of admissions (2023).

placements.overview:
Established in 2010, ISTS Women's Engineering College is located in Andhra Pradesh. The institute offers course like B.E. / B.Tech. This course is offered in Full Time mode. A total of 4 courses offered by the Institute are available across stream such as Engineering. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

ISTS Women's Engineering College offers a wide range of programmes at UG level. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Engineering. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech.

faqs.answer: A:    ISTS Women's Engineering College has been rated 4.8 on placements.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: 100 percent placements are guaranteed.

review_content.Placements: 99% of students got placements and the highest package is 12.5 LPA and the lowest package is 5.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, and HCL. The top roles offered are in artificial intelligence and machine learning.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are 4 mess for the students. Our college provides, 5 departments, 25 labs, 1 big library and 88 classrooms with high interior design. In terms of food quality, it's very tasty and very good. They provide milk, rice, tiffin, and varieties of 3 curries daily.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Covering key points on ISTS based on my experience.

review_content.Placements: From the previous year's batch (2024), almost 70% of students got placed, and 30% are yet to be placed. Our college tries its best to provide jobs to all. The highest package is 11 LPA, and the lowest received is 4 LPA. Companies such as IBM, Tech Mahindra, TCS, Pega Systems, Cognizant, and more can be checked out on our college website. When it comes to internships, our college still needs a little improvement in focusing on providing internships to all; however, we did virtual internships from Eduskills. Roles include Software Developers, Pega Developers, Testers, Full-Stack Developers, Java Full-Stack Developers, and more based on skills.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and good college.

review_content.Placements: Top recruiting companies like Tech Mahindra, TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, L&T, Hexaware, Thermal System, Capgemini and so many others visit our college for placements. Students can apply for top positions such as system engineer, power programmer, and software engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs, classrooms and library are good and clean. There are so many books in the library for study purposes and motivational books. The hostel is very good, neat and clean, and the food is very good; there are so many varieties of curries and tiffins. About sports and games, there are special courts for basketball, volleyball and kabaddi, and there is a games room for indoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of its faculty members and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The top recruiting companies were Cognizant and Accenture. The average salary package offered ranges from 5 LPA to 8 LPA AI in CSE it's good. Cognizant Accenture, Amazon, etc., also visit to hire students with a good percentage as a software developers and testing. The top companies will come for recruitment internships also, and the highest package offered in course.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available, it provides good classrooms and laboratories. The hostel was also comfortable. It provides canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games. Wi-Fi and library were also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: This college is worth it, and it is user friendly.

review_content.Placements: Our college is very good at providing placements and courses for every student. Every student is taken care of by the faculty members. Almost every student gets placed in any campus placement. Many MNCs recruited our college students. In every MNC, there is an ISTS student.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are very good and comfortable here. There is a very good infrastructure which every student can use without any hesitations. Most recent infrastructure is used like video classes, projector in every classroom and PPT presentations by students to develop their interpersonal skills.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the top colleges for girls with full security in Andhra Pradesh.

review_content.Placements: There is a pleasant atmosphere where every student gets into their dreams companies. We are so lucky to have the best placement opportunities in companies like Cognizant Digital Nurture. It has a good record in placements. The quality of placement at our college is excellent. Maximum students got placements with a good salary package. For placements, they will give excellent training.
review_content.Infrastructure: ISTS Women's Engineering College is one of the very good colleges with a peaceful atmosphere and good discipline. It is a good place to study with caretaking by management. It also provided an interactive board in all the classrooms. The college has all the necessary infrastructure and facilities. There is a well-maintained library with good books.

highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for Shri Madhwa Vadiraja Institute of Technology and Management (SMVITM) admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

A:    The median salary granted to students upon a successful placement from the Shri Madhwa Vadiraja Institute of Technology and Management (SMVITM) is INR 3.30 LPA, indicating the institution's commitment to fostering prosperous career beginnings, with graduates receiving a commendable financial remuneration.
faqs.question: What is the median placement salary offered to the students of Shri Madhwa Vadiraja Institute of Technology and Management (SMVITM)?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shri Madhwa Vadiraja Institute of Technology and Management (SMVITM) provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies, and have a fee structure of around INR 2,49,000 to 7,44,444. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech. Further, the PG programs include MBA/PGDM.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Shri Madhwa Vadiraja Institute of Technology and Management (SMVITM) is approximately INR 249000 - INR 654992.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good quality education.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our college. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, etc. The highest salary package offered is 18 LPA by some start-up companies. The average salary package offered is 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3.2 LPA by Tech Mahindra.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The Wi-Fi speed is very good. Labs are very good and have all equipment. Our classrooms are clean and have projectors. Our college has a huge library.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers and non-teaching staff members are highly knowledgeable and very friendly. They always support us. Our course curriculum is not updated.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Decent college in Udupi, good for academics, no support for extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of the students were placed, average CTC was around 3.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, infosys, Sasken recruited from SMVITM. Most of the roles assigned were course related. Mostly CSE and ECE students got placed in the companies, but mechanical and civil engineers didnt have placement support.
review_content.Infrastructure: Great classrooms and infrastructure, but cafeteria is bad. There is no good ground facility for sports. Thr principals house is constructed in the middle of a decent ground. Hostel rooms are below average, no proper food in mess. Cafeteria food will surely give you health issues.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you are really talented or want to learn something then it will be the best college.

content.Placements: In our college, many companies are coming like Unicourt, Sasken, etc. The minimum package is 2 to 4 lacs, and the highest package is 10 to 12 lacs and more. If you are good at full stack or you know full stack, then it's an easy placement here. Must need knowledge of C and Java, databases, etc. also.
content.Infrastructure: Good, well-qualified faculty members and the best classrooms are there. The canteen is well maintained and hygienic. We can have a variety of options at lower costs. Morning breakfast, afternoon lunch, evening snacks and night dinner are provided to hostel students. Really student-friendly campus is there.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: College has good infrastructure, but is dissatisfied because of campus selection.

content.Placements: There are no placements in my course and no companies come for my course. There are no good internships. It's hard to get scholarships. College schedule is not working toward that. Very few people join internships and there are no placements after graduation.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious and well-ventilated with good seating. Well-maintained laboratories for students to gain practical skills and conduct experiments. Safe hostel with proper security. Library with rich collection of books, e-books, and other audio-visual material.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good quality education.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our college. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, etc. The highest salary package offered is 18 LPA by some start-up companies. The average salary package offered is 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3.2 LPA by Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The Wi-Fi speed is very good. Labs are very good and have all equipment. Our classrooms are clean and have projectors. Our college has a huge library.
content.Faculty: All teachers and non-teaching staff members are highly knowledgeable and very friendly. They always support us. Our course curriculum is not updated.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Decent college in Udupi, good for academics, no support for extracurricular activities.

content.Placements: Around 80% of the students were placed, average CTC was around 3.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, infosys, Sasken recruited from SMVITM. Most of the roles assigned were course related. Mostly CSE and ECE students got placed in the companies, but mechanical and civil engineers didnt have placement support.
content.Infrastructure: Great classrooms and infrastructure, but cafeteria is bad. There is no good ground facility for sports. Thr principals house is constructed in the middle of a decent ground. Hostel rooms are below average, no proper food in mess. Cafeteria food will surely give you health issues.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I recommend students to join this college.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students get placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA and the lowest salary package is 3.3 LPA. Top recruiter was SAP in 2016. Internships are provided by the college since 2018 but are not paid. Students can do internships outside the college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is accessible only when you are logged in. Classrooms are average. Each classroom has a capacity of 60 students. Sports and annual athletes are organised in our college. The canteen is not good. It serves purely vegetarian food items that are costly compared to other colleges.

Shri Madhwa Vadiraja Institute of Technology and Management (SMVITM) Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 21345 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Shri Madhwa Vadiraja Institute of Technology and Management (SMVITM). In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 21345 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 22828.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.

In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 61311, in the General All India quota.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good place to build a proper career without having a desire to enjoy college life completely.
reviews.review_text: The labs of our college are equipped with the necessary computers. The campus is vast, with a limited number of trees and high temperature. The food served in the hostel is bad, but the hostel rooms are not very small. The food served in the canteen is average and inconsistent. However, sports and other facilities are good. But there are no medical facilities at all.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with the best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Labs here are well-equipped, and we also get access to the college Wi-Fi facility with separate student Ids and password. There are good classrooms with an accommodation capacity of 80 students, and they also have projectors. There is a library with great space and has all the necessary books which are needed for students. I will give a rating of 4 stars out of 5 stars for the food provided in canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Had a cherishful homely feeling in this college, a growing institute with lots of potential.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure with a separate building for each branch. Free Wi-Fi for educational purposes within the campus, well-equipped labs, and library. The food quality is good when it comes to taste it depends on person to person. The food has a local flavour so few might hate it. Good indoor and outdoor game facilities with a well-equipped gym in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college needs improvement when it comes to placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were good, and labs were of approved standards. Playground needs improvement. The library was set up with good collections of books. The campus was quite spacious. Wi-Fi facility was not available. The college needs to focus more on being digital, which was lagging.

reviews.review_heading: Placements were a bit increased last year. The infrastructure of the college is good.
reviews.review_text: We can access the Wi-Fi facility of our college to view details related to our course. Labs are well-facilitated. Labs, classrooms and our college have enough computers in each lab. There are useful books rated to course not only technical magazines and also novels. The hotel has the facility of two sharing rooms and three sharing rooms, TV, rearing section is also available here. The quality of the food served in the canteen is good. Sometimes the food served in the mess will not be up to the m...

reviews.review_heading: There are good placements here from last 2 years.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed is very high in our college, and the classrooms are nice and clean. The library has a huge number of books, and labs have all the required materials. The hostel is good, and I don't eat in the mess, so I don't know the taste of the food served there. Sports and games facilities are nice, and medical facilities are also available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best in Bangalore. Many facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a huge library block, sports and games are provided in the college. Quality of classrooms and the library is very good. Food provided in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Its a very good college and the fees less compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in a good area. It is well furnished and is very clean. We have digital library available for students. We have well maintained computer labs, well equipped mechanical workshops etc. And also a good sports room. Different branches have separate buildings.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the infrastructure, faculty, and surroundings but not very good placement facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good since it's a new college. Free Wi-Fi is provided but social media sites are restricted. Classrooms are clean and furniture is new. Library has almost all the textbooks that will be needed for our syllabus. There is a sports room with TT boards, carrom and chess for indoor and a basketball court, cricket stadium and volleyball court. The food given in canteen is purely vegetarian and it is pretty good. For any medical injuries, there is a omni that will immediate...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, faculty members, various facilities? And classrooms.
reviews.review_text: Compared Bangalore region Engineering colleges our college infrastructure is good. I had visited many colleges in Bangalore region during fests and other events and I found that our college infrastructure is far better than some reputed colleges. We have seperate blocks for each branch. We have huge library and reading rooms. Lift facility, wi-fi facility to all the students and staff, and Nice canteen these are some of the attractive features of our college. We also have 4 big Auditorium.

review_summary.college_name: B.B.S Group of Institution Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: My college has good facilities and excellent professors.

content.Placements: My college is affiliated with AKTU Lucknow Jankipuram and my course is B.Tech for a stream of electrical and electronics. My percentage is 72.80 without a back. The company hired students who got above 65% marks without any back in my college placement criteria. So, my college gave good internships to students.
content.Infrastructure: My college hostel facility is advanced and has modern facilities. There is free broadband Wi-Fi, labs and library, etc. Most of the time I prefer college lab. Sports facilities are nice as compared to other in my college. Time to time, functions are held.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college but has a few inexperienced faculty members.

content.Placements: In our course of B.Tech civil engineering, there were a few placements in companies like JP cement and a few other companies but when it comes to computer science and EC branch the placements were good, and companies like Infosys and others visit to hire students.
content.Infrastructure: The college building and its library were beautiful as compared to other colleges. Library provides centralised air-conditioner and computer laboratories facility. The hostel building was average, as well as there was a Wi-Fi facility for every student. The quality of food in the hostel was average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The faculty members are very helpful and understanding.

content.Placements: We faced many problems to get placements. The placements are not provided. The placements during corona are very difficult, so many companies can't hire freshers. This is a problem.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has the best infrastructure. The facilities are good. The hostel quality is better. The ground is huge, and we play cricket.
content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful and understanding. They explain the topics and help students to prepare for exams. The teachers are very humble and helpful. They explain the topics in a very understanding way. The teachers are the best.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Our campus has good faculty, placements, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good for our batch and our senior batch. Almost 60% of the students were hired by almost four or five companies. The lowest salary package offered was 2.5-3 LPA. Companies like HCl, Ashoka Leyland and TCS, visited the campus for placements. Almost 60% of students got internships from college. There is a placement cell available here.
content.Infrastructure: The college library is very good as all types of books are available here. The library is fully digitalised. High-speed Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. Labs are very good. Medical facilities, sports and games are available here. The canteen and hostel rooms are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Our college is not useful for doing engineering.

content.Placements: We have a placement cell in the college, but the placements are not up to the mark. Our seniors were well placed, but now the placements are not good. Not many students go for the internship. There is no stipend for the internship. The placement cell is inefficient. The minimum salary offered is Rs.15,000 and the maximum salary offered is 3LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not much good. Construction is going on. Labs in the college are not much useful. We have a library in the college. There are no medical facilities. The sports are not much organised. Hostels are good. The food provided is not much good. The classrooms are okay. We have Wi-Fi in the college.

At B.B.S Group of Institution, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering and Business and Management Studies.

Some of the popular B.B.S Group of Institution programmes are B.E. / B.Tech, etc at UG level and M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for B.B.S Group of Institution admissions:

hostel_campus.college_name: B.B.S Group of Institution Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My college has good facilities and excellent professors.
reviews.review_text: My college hostel facility is advanced and has modern facilities. There is free broadband Wi-Fi, labs and library, etc. Most of the time I prefer college lab. Sports facilities are nice as compared to other in my college. Time to time, functions are held.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by B.B.S.College of Engginering and TechnologyReviewed on 4 Feb 2022)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college but has a few inexperienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college building and its library were beautiful as compared to other colleges. Library provides centralised air-conditioner and computer laboratories facility. The hostel building was average, as well as there was a Wi-Fi facility for every student. The quality of food in the hostel was average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by B.B.S.College of Engginering and TechnologyReviewed on 17 Jul 2021)
reviews.review_heading: The faculty members are very helpful and understanding.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best infrastructure. The facilities are good. The hostel quality is better. The ground is huge, and we play cricket.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2014Offered by B.B.S.College of Engginering and TechnologyReviewed on 10 Apr 2019)
reviews.review_heading: Our campus has good faculty, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college library is very good as all types of books are available here. The library is fully digitalised. High-speed Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. Labs are very good. Medical facilities, sports and games are available here. The canteen and hostel rooms are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is not useful for doing engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not much good. Construction is going on. Labs in the college are not much useful. We have a library in the college. There are no medical facilities. The sports are not much organised. Hostels are good. The food provided is not much good. The classrooms are okay. We have Wi-Fi in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with our teachers and directors.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs and libraries are perfect for students. Our college is enabled with Jio Wi-Fi, so we get much more speed as compared to the previous one. Every year, our college organises a tech fest. Our college gives proper foods to the students. All the labs are air-conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for its infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there is Wi-Fi facility on the campus. There are a computer lab and many other labs for practice purpose. In this college, there are two separate hostels for boys and girls. The building of this college is very beautiful, and it also has a very wide playground for sports.

reviews.review_heading: I am a mechanical engineering student, so I don't feel good to do engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is fantastic. I love the college infrastructure, but the environment is not good. The requirement for the engineering students, so overall its okay but not the best. So its depend on you, but in Allahabad area, I think it is the best infrastructure in comparison to all other private colleges.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by B.B.S.College of Engginering and TechnologyReviewed on 11 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of B.B.S.College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is average. Good food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical and sports facilities are below average. The campus grounds and classrooms provide the best environment. Medical support is provided by D-Pharm and B-Pharm members.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in prayagraj for B. Teach, MBA, bcaand BBA manymore courses.
reviews.review_text: Faculty of are college is very knowledgeable and very generous and also very supportive and all faculty members are highly educated and Ph.D. or dr and about department full Wi-Fi campus and labs are very good and computer labs are very good all computer systems are new and classroom with digital board help any topic with visualisation understanding.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2017Offered by B.B.S.College of Engginering and TechnologyReviewed on 23 Feb 2022)
reviews.review_heading: This college has a really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Wi-Fi is available and classrooms are well ventilated. There is a good library and air conditioned classrooms. Medical facilities are not available but sports and canteen are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by B.B.S.College of Engginering and TechnologyReviewed on 22 May 2021)
reviews.review_heading: The college is very good, and you can opt for it.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very big infrastructure. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. Fresh food is delivered, and there is also an ATM on the college campus. Medical facilities are also available, which are satisfactory. Many sports and technical festivals are organised.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by B.B.S.College of Engginering and TechnologyReviewed on 30 Dec 2019)
reviews.review_heading: In the summer vacation, students must train themselves in good company.
reviews.review_text: In our college, facilities are good for education and practicals. The infrastructure of our college is very good and big. Library departments are bad because they have the oldest books for students. The syllabus is incomplete, but the gaming program is good in our college.

Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The review of G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Ahmednagar.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are quite good. Infosys visited our college in December 2018 for a big campus drive that is conducted to hire the students of all over Ahmednagar. Students who did their diplomas are assured some good opportunities through our college campus drives. The college also provides bus transportation facility for the students to reach off-campus placement drives.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. There's a building for the engineering course in which a number of students can gain quality knowledge. We also have a good playground beside the college building, and there is a great parking area to park almost 200 two-wheelers and about 20 four-wheelers.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The best college when compared with all other colleges in Ahmednagar.

review_content.Placements: The placements of our college are great. All the final year students are sent to Wagoli, Pune branch of our college for the final placement interview. Various well-reputed technical companies were invited to the college and various roles are offered for freshers. Companies such as Infosys, Inditronics, Echotech IT Solutions, Qualex System Pvt. Ltd., and many more companies are invited. The salary packages offered were also good. The minimum package offered was 3.5 LPA and the maximum salary package offered was 5.6 LPA. About 52% of the students got the internships. There is a placements cell, and it is useful. The placement cell helps a lot for the better performance of the students in the interview. They make the students practice for the interview. During this practice session, all the students help each other with their problems. Overall, the placements of our college are great.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Ahmednagar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Experience of fresher in G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Ahmednagar.

content.Placements: As per my information, 50-60% of students get placed in college. The highest package is 22 LPA and the average package is 4 LPA. Companies like Amazon, TCS, Wipro, etc., visit our college to hire mechanical engineering students. Many students get government internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very poor in all departments. It has Wi-Fi but students do not get the password. Classrooms are normal and the library is good enough. It has many libraries. The college hostel is really bad, and they do not even get to wash their clothes. The mess quality is also very poor. We also have other options outside the college hostel. There are PG and flats near the college. There are many medical facilities. Sports facilities are also poor. A gym is only for the college hostel students and others are not allowed in it. It has a turf as well as a basketball court.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with its hostel facility.

content.Placements: I was from the mechanical branch. Students got placed from this college in HP Adler Pelzer which was located in Chakan, Pune. Students were taken as a graduate trainee engineers, and after that students had to work as labour in the machine. So these types of jobs they provided to students.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel was the only good thing. The third class management system and the infrastructure were good, but this college was not colored and this looks ugly from the outside.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality was not good, and the teachers cannot speak English very well. The semester exams were good. The teaching skills were good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The review of G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Ahmednagar.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are quite good. Infosys visited our college in December 2018 for a big campus drive that is conducted to hire the students of all over Ahmednagar. Students who did their diplomas are assured some good opportunities through our college campus drives. The college also provides bus transportation facility for the students to reach off-campus placement drives.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. There's a building for the engineering course in which a number of students can gain quality knowledge. We also have a good playground beside the college building, and there is a great parking area to park almost 200 two-wheelers and about 20 four-wheelers.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The best college when compared with all other colleges in Ahmednagar.

content.Placements: The placements of our college are great. All the final year students are sent to Wagoli, Pune branch of our college for the final placement interview. Various well-reputed technical companies were invited to the college and various roles are offered for freshers. Companies such as Infosys, Inditronics, Echotech IT Solutions, Qualex System Pvt. Ltd., and many more companies are invited. The salary packages offered were also good. The minimum package offered was 3.5 LPA and the maximum salary package offered was 5.6 LPA. About 52% of the students got the internships. There is a placements cell, and it is useful. The placement cell helps a lot for the better performance of the students in the interview. They make the students practice for the interview. During this practice session, all the students help each other with their problems. Overall, the placements of our college are great.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: My college is a good college.

content.Placements: There are several good companies that held campus interview in the college like Larson and Tubro. A few students can manage to get a job through campus interview. Students also have an opportunity to work with local firms or companies from which they get experience.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very good infrastructure and fresh atmosphere. The classrooms have the facility of a projector. Also, there is an advanced computer lab. The college has a big sports ground. It has a good canteen where we can eat all types of breakfast. The food quality of canteen is average.

reviews.review_heading: Experience of fresher in G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Ahmednagar.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very poor in all departments. It has Wi-Fi but students do not get the password. Classrooms are normal and the library is good enough. It has many libraries. The college hostel is really bad, and they do not even get to wash their clothes. The mess quality is also very poor. We also have other options outside the college hostel. There are PG and flats near the college. There are many medical facilities. Sports facilities are also poor. A gym is only for the coll...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its hostel facility.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was the only good thing. The third class management system and the infrastructure were good, but this college was not colored and this looks ugly from the outside.

reviews.review_heading: The review of G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Ahmednagar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There's a building for the engineering course in which a number of students can gain quality knowledge. We also have a good playground beside the college building, and there is a great parking area to park almost 200 two-wheelers and about 20 four-wheelers.

reviews.review_heading: The best college when compared with all other colleges in Ahmednagar.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure compared to any other college in Ahmednagar city. The college campus is well-maintained and clean. There are three buildings on the campus. One building for Polytechnic section, one for the Master's and Bachelor's degree section and the last building, is for the girls' hostel. The classrooms and the labs are well-organised and provided with all the required accessories. There is a hostel on the campus itself. The girls' hotel is present in the college prem...

reviews.review_heading: My college is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good infrastructure and fresh atmosphere. The classrooms have the facility of a projector. Also, there is an advanced computer lab. The college has a big sports ground. It has a good canteen where we can eat all types of breakfast. The food quality of canteen is average.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. The classrooms have AC. The study environment is good, and the furniture is well-designed. All the computers are good. It is a good college for education in Maharashtra.

paragraphs: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.

The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

Many companies offer great salary packages in metro cities which are hub for IT companies as well as other reputed MNCs. The salary also differs as per the entry level. After gaining experience of 2-5 years, you can expect a salary of 8-12 LPA and then shift from technical to managerial roles.

admission_overview.college_name: NIELIT Patna Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Application, FAQs

admission_process.title: NIELIT Patna Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: NIELIT Patna admission 2025is ongoing. The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, located in Patna, gives different Diploma and Certification courses for interested candidates. NIELIT Patna gives short and long-term courses for candidates who have cleared Class 12 or Class 10. The admission process is merit-based for the courses on offer in the 2025 admission process. Candidates can apply for their desired course through the official website of NIELIT Patna.

NIELIT Patna gives courses in the online mode for shortlisted candidates. The admission process is merit-based, and candidates are required to apply for their desired course online. The course duration at NIELIT Patna ranges from a month to four years. Check out the highlights table below to learn more:
NOTE: The information given in the above table is sourced from different sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

NIELIT Patna gives different courses at different course levels. Candidates seeking admission to the courses on offer in the admission process 2025 must meet the eligibility criteria and follow the step-by-step admission process. Check out the eligibility and selection criteria of the courses through the table given below:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Advance Diploma in Computer Application Accounting and Publishing
Merit-based
Certified Multimedia Developer
Merit-based

NIELIT Patna Fee 2025

Courses at NIELIT Patna are offered at different course fees. Candidates who have cleared the admission process become eligible to pay the course fee and secure their admission. The seat intake is set by the institute to decide the total number of candidates that can be admitted. Learn more about NIELIT Patna fee and seat intake through the table given below:
NOTE: The above-mentioned fee and seat intake are taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

Admissions to NIELIT Patna are merit-based. Candidates must apply for their desired course through the application form that is given on the official website of the institute. The courses are offered at Certification and Diploma course levels for candidates. Check out the steps given to learn about the steps for admission:
Step 1: NIELIT Patna Application Process 2025

The application process for NIELIT Patna is online. Candidates are required to create an account by filling in their email id and phone number. Once registered, candidates can proceed to fill out the application form and pay the application fees.
Step 2: Selection Round

NIELIT Patna gives admission on a merit basis to candidates. The candidates are judged on different factors such as their Class 10 and Class 12 performance. Candidates are required to provide authentic data related to their academics in the application form.
Step 3: Final Offer
Candidates who make it to the final shortlist of the admission process are given a seat to their applied for course. Candidates are then to pay the course fee to start attending the classes.

reviews_list.review_title: Perfect university, if you are not interested to visit regularly there.

review_content.Placements: We didn’t have anything like college placements at all, especially for the BE Computer field. There were some placements regarding roles like sales, data entry, etc., about 30%. TCS was one of companies in which a few got placements for data entry roles. Internships were mostly arranged by ourselves, but a few online internship and certification links were provided. As of now, we are self-employed, not placed by the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library was good, filled with necessary books but mostly of old syllabi. Wi-Fi never worked, you could see bats and honeybees in classrooms. The computer labs were like a kabad khana. The canteen was useless, offering only poha, samosas, and Maggi were there, and no good quality food. The medical facilities were rated 5/10. Sports and games were available and rated 7/10.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is good if we do not have any other option.

review_content.Placements: The average salary package offered is only 2 LPA. No big companies that visit to college for on-campus placement. We can only try for off-campus placement. There are no internships offered in college, and I don't know even a single student who got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not working, and only a few are working in labs. Classrooms are clean and good. All books are provided by the library. The hostel is good, with three options for students. The quality of food in the mess is good, but there should be better quality food in the canteen.

overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: Hansaba College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Gokul Global University offers the best placements.

content.Placements: Many students get placed every year in our college with good salary packages. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA. The average salary package offered is 2 LPA. Every year, the internship program is conducted on campus. All students got internships. Many private sector companies visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is well-maintained. Our college provides facilities like a library, Wi-Fi, a canteen, a hostel, and laboratories. Facilities of the hostel are good. The quality of the food is good. The playground is available to play games like sports, indoor games, and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our campus is beautiful.

content.Placements: Around 8000 students in our mechanical course were placed. The highest salary package offered is 20 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA. The average salary offered is 12 LPA. Adani, Torrent, Tech Mahindra etc., are the recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: Amenities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, stationery, ground, malls, are available here. The quality of the food served is good. The canteen is also good. Medical facilities are available here. Sports and games are conducted here every week. This college is good for all the activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Perfect university, if you are not interested to visit regularly there.

content.Placements: We didn’t have anything like college placements at all, especially for the BE Computer field. There were some placements regarding roles like sales, data entry, etc., about 30%. TCS was one of companies in which a few got placements for data entry roles. Internships were mostly arranged by ourselves, but a few online internship and certification links were provided. As of now, we are self-employed, not placed by the college.
content.Infrastructure: The library was good, filled with necessary books but mostly of old syllabi. Wi-Fi never worked, you could see bats and honeybees in classrooms. The computer labs were like a kabad khana. The canteen was useless, offering only poha, samosas, and Maggi were there, and no good quality food. The medical facilities were rated 5/10. Sports and games were available and rated 7/10.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is good if we do not have any other option.

The hostel is good, with three options for students. The quality of food in the mess is good, but there should be better quality food in the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good, but the way of teaching should be improved.

content.Placements: If you have any talent in a particular field, then it would be easier to get placements. Everything does not depend on academic percentage, and even sometimes, Google hires some of the students even before completing their degree. So, it all depends on the knowledge and the experience of students to get placements.
content.Infrastructure: We are provided with a free Wi-Fi facility here, and the labs and classrooms have huge space. The library has almost every book, so there is no problem with it. If our dean is satisfied with students, then they provide lunch in the canteen for free of cost. Our dean is a good man, and the quality of the food served is just decent but not much good. If you adjust to that food, then it might be perfect here, and even the food is better than the food provided in some canteens.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is well-maintained. Our college provides facilities like a library, Wi-Fi, a canteen, a hostel, and laboratories. Facilities of the hostel are good. The quality of the food is good. The playground is available to play games like sports, indoor games, and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is beautiful.
reviews.review_text: Amenities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, stationery, ground, malls, are available here. The quality of the food served is good. The canteen is also good. Medical facilities are available here. Sports and games are conducted here every week. This college is good for all the activities.

reviews.review_heading: Perfect university, if you are not interested to visit regularly there.
reviews.review_text: The library was good, filled with necessary books but mostly of old syllabi. Wi-Fi never worked, you could see bats and honeybees in classrooms. The computer labs were like a kabad khana. The canteen was useless, offering only poha, samosas, and Maggi were there, and no good quality food. The medical facilities were rated 5/10. Sports and games were available and rated 7/10.

reviews.review_heading: It is good if we do not have any other option.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working, and only a few are working in labs. Classrooms are clean and good. All books are provided by the library. The hostel is good, with three options for students. The quality of food in the mess is good, but there should be better quality food in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good, but the way of teaching should be improved.
reviews.review_text: We are provided with a free Wi-Fi facility here, and the labs and classrooms have huge space. The library has almost every book, so there is no problem with it. If our dean is satisfied with students, then they provide lunch in the canteen for free of cost. Our dean is a good man, and the quality of the food served is just decent but not much good. If you adjust to that food, then it might be perfect here, and even the food is better than the food provided in some canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Our college had good infrastructure and good placements in 2016.
reviews.review_text: Hansaba College of Engineering and Technology was a Wi-Fi enabled campus. There were good facilities for different types of labs. All machines were available in labs, and classrooms were air-conditioned. The library was big, and all types of books were available in the library. The canteen was huge and served good food.

faqs.answer: A:    JP Institute of Engineering and Technology offers Degree and Diploma courses including 6 UG and 3 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. JP Institute of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Automobile Engineering, Production Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is an average college to get an AKTU degree with less price.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are very bad. Not a single company visited our college for placements. For some years we are waiting to get any chance, but after very disappointment, we find some companies by ourselves. So if you want only a degree, then join this college. Do not join this college with the hope of placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, it is a good college for its infrastructure.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are average. Everything depends on their mood, and if they want to help students, then they do. Otherwise, they neglect. If you can do everything on your own, then I suggest opting for this college. Passing out students from B.Tech can teach polytechnic students, which is very bad as they teach very little. They don't focus on students' future, and they just ask to study on their own. They are not responsible for anything anywhere, but some faculty members are good and help students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: I was satisfied with all the facilities of this college.

review_content.Placements: The placements were not good in this college. But with time, things got improved, and more students started getting placed. The placement team changed, and the work speed got boosted. By the end of 2015, the majority of students got placed and in our batch, around 80% of students got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, laboratories, infrastructure, hostel, and everything was very good. There was much support from the part of seniors and everyone used to follow the anti-ragging instructions. The Wi-Fi facility was very good. As it is 2015, it still arranged the Wi-Fi facility for the students.

JP Institute of Engineering and Technology - JPIET will be like heaven for the students.

admission_process.title: JP Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JP Institute of Engineering and Technology admissionsare completely merit-based. The institute offers 13 programmes.JP Institute of Engineering and Technologyoffers courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through its official website. JP Institute of Engineering and Technology admission is done based on scores of exams like JEE Main, CUET-PG, and JEECUP. The university offers over 13 courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in field, such as Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software. Read more details around JP Institute of Engineering and Technology admission in the following article.
At UG, PG and After 10th level, B.E. / B.Tech and MBA/PGDM are among the top courses offered at JP Institute of Engineering and Technology.

description: JP Institute of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about JP Institute of Engineering and Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The JP Institute of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the JP Institute of Engineering and Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 471965 and 833597 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Electron

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 471965 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 848002 in 2023.

JP Institute of Engineering and Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to JP Institute of Engineering and Technology can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

JP Institute of Engineering and Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for JP Institute of Engineering and Technology.

As the JP Institute of Engineering and Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at JP Institute of Engineering and Technology.
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top two most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with the closing ranks of 1290870 and 2121195, respectively.

For admission to JP Institute of Engineering and Technology for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to JP Institute of Engineering and Technology.

reviews.review_heading: Please don't take admission in JPIET. It will destroy your future.
reviews.review_text: There are neither lab teachers nor any proper faculty available for the proper subjects. Hostel facilities are bad. There is no cleaning facility in the hostel. The quality of the mess food is very bad and tasteless. The fee charged is also very high. The hostel fee is around Rs. 66,000 per month. The college fee is around Rs. 90,000 per month. I will advise that students should not take admission in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides really good infrastructure and facilities but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in this college like a hostel, etc. There are good classrooms. The college offers a very good environment for study. All labs are good as compared to nearby colleges. The quality of the food served in the college canteen is good. I didn't face any issue regarding the infrastructure of the college during my tenure.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of placements, education, faculty, and hostel environment.
reviews.review_text: The campus environment is very poor. There are no infrastructure facilities. We know that every college has a separate accountant, but in this college, in our college, the fee is collected by the respective HODs as this college doesn't pay them for 4-5 months or even more.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and facilities are good, but the management is poor.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus is very eco-friendly. The management takes care of the environment. The campus has a lot of greenery, and some buildings are not visible because of tall trees on the campus. All facilities like playground, basketball courts, etc., are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, but still, they have to improve their quality of teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Labs and classrooms are very nice. There are facilities like Wi-Fi, library, sports, and playground. All classrooms are very good. The lobbies, study room, medical facilities, and labs are very clean and well maintained. The cafeteria is beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college because of poor placement records and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms and labs are good. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Our library has a good reputation. Food served in the canteen is good. There are 3 canteens on our campus, and 2 canteens are open until 9 pm. The hostel rooms are spacious and good. Food offered in the mess is average. I'm not facing any infrastructure related issues.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and teachers are good.
reviews.review_text: This is not jaypee engineering college, it's j. p institute of engineering and technology but Infrastructure is good as compare as another college and I give 9 marks out of 10. Lab and library are also good. Medical facilities are available for hostel students. Hostel event also be occur here by seniors. There is no ranging here senior and junior both are living familiar.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the placements, really good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Wi-Fi facility is available every time, and labs are very good. Classrooms are available in every building, and a library is also available. Medical facilities are provided, and sports and games are held every year. Quality of labs and classroom is good. Food in the canteen is best, and hostel rooms are average. I did not face any problem related to infrastructure.

college_info.college_name: Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society's Group of Institutions: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society s Group of Institutions:

placements.overview:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Established in 2009, Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society's Group of Institutions is a private institute in Ghatkesar, Telangana. The institute is approved by the PCI and AICTE. At the UG and PG levels, the institute offers 13 courses across 9 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society's Group of Institutions programs include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Pharma and M.Pharma. Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society's Group of Institutions courses are provided in several streams including Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 1378 students. The fees at Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society's Group of Institutions ranges between INR 90,000 to 3,80,000 for the different courses. Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society's Group of Institutions placements are vibrant, with the average median salary standing at around INR 3,47,500. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: My experiences in college.

review_content.Placements: In our college, the ECE batch is getting more attention from the administration and making the college more responsible for this batch. In our college, companies like Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, etc. are top recruiters. Although we study the course in college, we should definitely study or learn extra courses for future development.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is only a girls' hostel in our college, not for boys. Boys should stay in private hostels near the college. For girls, it looks like there is good infrastructure, food and facilities in their hostel. About the college, we have fully equipped labs and a library for peaceful studying.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The campus life is worth living.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80 percent are placed in top MNC companies with good packages, and min average package is about 3 LPA. Very good training in our college from our course side, they really train us for future work in the companies with the professional.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are absolutely fine, not just fine, but very good infrastructure. Lab facilities are really wonderful, and the computers are really fast, no issues with them. If there are any issues, they will be solved on time so that we can practice more towards our goal.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good and better satisfied with the faculty, and have no idea about placements.

review_content.Placements: In our CSE course, there are 300% or more students in our college. The 10 LPA package is the highest, and below 10 LPA is the lowest offered in our college. Top recruiting companies are Google, Gmail, Amazon, Flipkart, Infosys, etc. The top roles offered in computer science and engineering are artificial intelligence and machine learning, data sciences, etc. The percentage of students who got an internship from the course CSE is unknown.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no proper Wi-Fi, and about labs, there are no proper systems and if the system works keyboard and mouse doesn't work properly. In the library, we get all types of books. In the hostels, there is good food and clean water for other purposes, like domestic, etc. Canteens are neat and clean, and we get all the food from the canteen. Medical facilities are also available. Sports and games are also conducted yearly.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good for academic purposes, and placement opportunities should be improved.

review_content.Placements: Placements are conducted in our college, and many companies such as Google, Wipro, Infosys, Oracle, and other companies visit for placement. I think 60-80 percent placements in the last year. Students who are good at communication as well as coding skills will get placed easily.
review_content.Infrastructure: Various facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, library, and cafeteria are present in our college. Indoor and outdoor sports are conducted and encouraged in our college. Only a girls' hostel is present in our college. The food provided in our college is clean and tasty. The canteen consists of various menus at a reasonable price.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: We have decent infrastructure and good facilities, but the curriculum should be updated.

review_content.Placements: In our college, on average, 30 percent of students are getting placed with an average package of 4 to 5 LPA. For our college, the top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. In our college, most of the students are getting data entry or call center jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have good basic infrastructure with fully equipped labs and Wi-Fi connections, as well as a fully equipped library. We do not have a boys' hostel; only a girls' hostel is provided, which is well maintained with good food and emergency medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A+ NAAC accreditation, strong placements, quality education.

review_content.Placements: Some of the seniors of the college got internships, I don't know the exact percentage but many students have applied for the internship, placements are going on in our college, and based on skills and performance, students will be selected, and I think about 60–80 percent got placed in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good with peaceful classes and well-developed laboratories, the library contains useful academic books and reference materials, Wi-Fi facility is also available, and seminar halls are used for workshops and conducting various events.

cut_off.college_name: Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society’s Group of Institutions Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society's Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society's Group of Institutions TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 39982 and 50172 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, t

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 39982, 41121 and 44432, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society's Group of Institutions. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Nalla Narasimha Reddy Education Society's Group of Institutions MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 12696. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 16844, and the 2023 cutoff was 15512 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

admission_process.title: N.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: N.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technology admission 2025is open for all the courses. The institute offersBTech and PhD courses.N.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technologycarried out the application inonline mode. Admission to both BTech and PhD isentrance-based. The institute is affiliated withJNTUH University, so the institute follows JNTUH admission norms for admission to all its courses. All the information related toN.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technology admissionalong with course eligibility and selection criteria is available in the following segments.

N.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technologyadmission to all the courses is entrance-based. Admission 2025is open for all BTech and PhD courses. Candidates are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria for the respective course. The institute offers admission to BTech based on the EAPCET exam. Further, for PhD institutes accept the scores of GATE and UGC NET.The table below listsN.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technology courseseligibility along with their accepted entrance exams, & selection process:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
B.E. / B.Tech
Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board
EAPCET/ECET Counselling
Masters’s degree from a recognised board
GATE,UGC NET

N.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technology admission process 2025is open for all courses. The institute offers entrance-based admission to BTech and PhD. Candidates must complete the admission process of N.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technology for admission. Check below theN.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technology admission process:
Step 1: Application Process 2025
Candidates seeking admission to N.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technology in any course are required to apply on the official website of N.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technology.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

N.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technology admission is entrance-based. Additionaly. Candidates need to fill out the eligibility criteria i.e.,pass Class 12 for admission to BTech and pass masters for admission to PhD.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission
Candidates who get shortlisted in the selection round must pay the admission fee to lock in final seats.
