reviews.review_heading: It will be a good choice for improving knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available across the campus for laptops. Classrooms will have digital board with good seating arrangement. Library consists of more than 5000 books related to both subjects and also articles. Food is moderate, and medical services will be available 24X7.

reviews.review_heading: N.B.K.R Institute of Science and Technology is a perfect college.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi will be available across the campus for laptops. Classrooms will have 60 to 65 students with a good seating arrangement and digital classes. The library consists of more than 5000 books related to various subjects, and also weekly articles about what's going on in college.

reviews.review_heading: Have any doubt about N.B.K.R. Institute of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available like Wi-Fi, labs, library, classrooms, etc. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess is also very good, and the canteen and medical facilities are available 24/7. Sports and games are average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college, and I like it.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very good Wi-Fi connections, very good classrooms, and useful books in the library. Hostels and food facilities are of high quality. If I have any issues, I can easily access medical checkups in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely perfect compared to other colleges in the area.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are fine, just to get things done. Wi-Fi is a bit of trouble because sometimes its locked and sometimes its open. Classrooms are very good, no complaints about that. Library is also fine. I am not a hosteler, so I dont know anything about the hostels and things like that.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because faculty. Placements, infrastructure, and facilities are also good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on campus, but it is only for faculty usage. Labs are very neat, and the best systems are available. Classrooms and the library are accessible, and hostel food is of very good quality. Canteen food is also available in the college. Every block has a medical kit, and sports and games are highly encouraged in this college.

reviews.review_heading: College is the best in infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good enough with seating arrangement of 60 students provided with a projector. Wi-Fi is available across the campus. Labs contain all the academic equipment which are working but few are defective. Library is filled with books above 5,000, and we also have a study hall.

reviews.review_heading: College is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Our department is provided with well-equipped labs and classes with projector. We have a library which consists of all the concepts related to each part, not only of engineering but also psychology, etc. We have a good atmosphere around our hostel and food is ok.

reviews.review_heading: It is a quite good college.
reviews.review_text: Our department is provided with well-equipped classes with a projector and extraordinary. We have a library which consists of books related to all the branches. We have a good environment around our college. I am a day scholar so my friends told me that the food is ok.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college library contains more than 10,000 books, which not only support student curriculum but also enhance knowledge on various aspects. Wi-Fi is free for laptops, but it has some restrictions. We get hygienic hostel rooms outside for boys.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are experienced and highly qualified.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in our college are Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, canteen, CAD lab, and bookshop. The facilities in our hostel are Wi-Fi, washing machines, CCTV, food, and TV. The food in the canteen is nice, with reasonable prices and quality. Medical facilities are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the placement is low but we can get some knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi can be accessed across the campus, mainly in the library. Labs have moderate technology, not advanced. We have decent classroom with 60 members accommodated in each class. Canteen contains both veg and non-veg food items. Library has more than 5,000 books which knowledge about the present outcome in subjects.

reviews.review_heading: Good learning environment with helpful staff.
reviews.review_text: Our course has good facilities like computer labs, smart classrooms, and a library with useful books. The labs have all the necessary equipment. Medical rooms are also available for students to rest if they feel unwell. The canteen food is not good in our college, so we bring food from home.

reviews.review_heading: Taking admission to this college is a fine choice.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the classrooms are very neatly maintained, some classes have digital boards, and there are seminar halls. Wi-Fi is available only during lectures. We have the finest library in our college. The hostel is very good, the food is great and hygienic. There is a large ground where we can play sports and games.

review_content.Placements: Our students got placed in top companies like TCS with the highest package of 11 Lacs per annum. The average package offered by the companies will be of 4 Lacs per annum. Our students should be placed in various roles based on their skills, passion, and interests.
review_content.Infrastructure: It's a green and peaceful environment, giving us positive vibes. Our classrooms are fully ventilated with fresh air. There is a big open auditorium present at the center of our campus, and there is a closed auditorium too. Nearly two to three cultural events are conducted yearly.

review_content.Placements: At our college, the maximum number of students got placed by 2024 placement records. The highest package offered by recruiters will be 12.5 lacs per annum. The median package offered by the recruiters will be 5.0 lacs per annum. About 90% of students got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available within our college campus. The buses are maintained in good condition with proper decorum. The food available in our canteen is of high quality and yummy. All the medical and sports facilities are available on our campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good for those whose only goal is study. Bad in terms of campus life.

review_content.Placements: There are placement activities available at the college. And there is no extra cost to join placement programs, I think. You will be selected for sure by any company. But the thing is, if you are selected, you can't attend any other off-campus interviews; they just won't allow it. And they will take action against you if you do so. The average salary package is 10–25k.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available at the college. But not for students. The only Wi-Fi students can access is in the library. It's so slow. In the hostel, there were beds available when I stayed. Other things, like bedsheets and pillows, should be brought from home or bought here. Morning tea will be available, as will breakfast, lunch, evening tea and dinner. Sunday will be non-vegetarian for lunch and Wednesday will be non-vegetarian for dinner.

individual_reviews.title: An average college with jail rules.

content.Placements: In my college, the average salary package is 2.5 LPA and the highest will be 5 LPA. Most of the placement drives are focusing on IT and CSE departments, but there are many opportunities for internships in every department, even if it is not related to the course. content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average compared to other nearby colleges. There is a large difference in reality compared to its brochure and promotions, which makes students fall for ads and leads to higher disappointment. reviews.review_heading: Sri Shanmugha College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: It's a green and peaceful environment, giving us positive vibes. Our classrooms are fully ventilated with fresh air. There is a big open auditorium present at the center of our campus, and there is a closed auditorium too. Nearly two to three cultural events are conducted yearly.

reviews.review_heading: About My B.Tech Computer Science and Cybersecurity Degree.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available within our college campus. The buses are maintained in good condition with proper decorum. The food available in our canteen is of high quality and yummy. All the medical and sports facilities are available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good for those whose only goal is study. Bad in terms of campus life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available at the college. But not for students. The only Wi-Fi students can access is in the library. It's so slow. In the hostel, there were beds available when I stayed. Other things, like bedsheets and pillows,  should be brought from home or bought here. Morning tea will be available, as will breakfast, lunch, evening tea and dinner. Sunday will be non-vegetarian for lunch and Wednesday will be non-vegetarian for dinner.

reviews.review_heading: They provide good faculty. Provide good in their academics but not good at festivals and celebration
reviews.review_text:
The college is situated on over 100 acres. Shanmugha is an institute. It contains engineering, nursing, pharmacy-allied science, etc. It has good sports grounds for football and cricket. There is a basketball court also. The college has a canteen. Canteens provide good-quality food, but they provide only a small quantity.
They provide a good hostel for girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Artificial intelligence in SSCET.
reviews.review_text: In college, the infrastructure for the course is average. There are many computer labs available in the college, and all are free to access for students. But many of the systems are not working properly. Some may not contain the needed software. In the hostel, there is no system or Wi-Fi available.

reviews.review_heading: The campus rules are very strict. Infrastructure is really good. We can't enjoy our college life.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is around 100 acres, which contains Engineering block, pharmacy block, nursing block, etc. Campus provides free Wi-Fi only in labs and libraries; other areas of campus will not have Wi-Fi. The college canteen service is not very good. The quality of the food is okay, but the cost is very high. The campus contains football, cricket, and basketball facilities and also provides medical and first aid facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SSCET BE Agriculture engineering.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are adequately available for the course. In the library, enough books are available, but for some subjects, proper books are not available. In the hostel, the facilities are poor. Sockets are not even available in the hostel rooms. Sports facilities are there, but students can't access them.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of bad placements. No core companies are coming .
reviews.review_text: Labs only available with few equipments and machines. Course related major books are available in library. Classrooms is also good. Labs are now congusted because of renovation works. And not provided adequate space for agri labs. Hostel is okey, but rules are strict.

reviews.review_heading: The college is not suitable for a non IT department student.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is really poor from the day I joined the college the hostel is still in maintenance. There is no Wi-Fi connectivity in hostel and systems are also not available properly. For the course infrastructure there are only few space and equipments not available.

reviews.review_heading: For IT-related courses, the college is very good. Even though agri is there, placement is very poor.
reviews.review_text: For agriculture courses, the college provides good infrastructure. There is agricultural land specifically for agri students to cultivate crops, and also they can practice their work there. The labs are fully equipped with machinery and other essentials.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was huge. All classrooms were well-maintained. There was a decent library in this college. The food served in the hostel was decent.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Shanmugha College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Campus infrastructure and transportation were very good. Extracurricular activities and indoor and outdoor games were good. Hostel facilities were very neat. It serves hygienic food. The hostel provided an average Wi-Fi connection.

reviews.review_heading: I am very happy to study in this college.
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities with high-speed internet projector for each class are available in our college. The campus has an incubation center. There are more than 4 companies on campus. The campus has the isthera food court. The price of the food is very low and the taste is very good.

review_content.General: Our department is continuing to improve its infrastructure and provide practical labs for Tissue culture, Microbiology, Molecular Biology, and some others. It also owns a library which remains closed maximum times but if possible it is a proper place to utilise the gap period. Unfortunately, there's no Wi-Fi or I haven't identified its Wi-Fi in the department. Classrooms are average, some have defective fans while some have defective benches. There is a smart classroom also but there's is no switch to the inverter or generator during power off. The quality of facilities in our hostel is better than expected. There's a proper eye on hygiene and taste of foods in the mess. The canteen contains very few listed items. Medical facilities are average as there is a dispensary and many students do not find the right option to choose it. Sports and games are also available such as table tennis, shotput, race, kho-kho, etc.

review_content.Placements: Around 30% of students get placed every year. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.8 LPA. BioTecNika, Syngene, etc., visit oruc college. Our college does not provide internships. review_content.Infrastructure: We have well-equipped laboratories. They help to gain more skills for industrial purposes. We have well-equipped hybrid classrooms. They are sanitised. Teh campus has Wi-Fi. We have a centralised library. The hostel is well-maintained. It provides drinking water. It has a pleasant environment. reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for biotechnology.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides placements. There are 60 seats in the biotech but admitted students till the latest batch are around 40-45. After doing B.Tech, it is very rare to get higher packages. You have to select M.tech to get high salary packages. Our university provides placements on campus. The salary package offered is around 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Most of the students go for further higher studies. If you do the M.tech in the field of biotechnology, then the salary package will be around 40 LPA - 50 LPA. Recruiting drug companies like Sun Pharma, etc. There are internship programs for students throughout the course. Microsoft and Infosys visit our college for internships. After doing B.Tech biotechnology, you can go for research and Ph.D. Government jobs are available after B.Tech.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not up to the mark, but infrastructure is quite good.

content.Placements: There is no placement for biotechnology in our college. Although other courses provide placement, about 60-80% of students are placed each year. Infosys, Reliance, etc., are top recruiters. Education is good in terms of both theory and practical. They provide educational tours after the 2nd year.
content.Infrastructure: There is a Wi-Fi connection in the library and in the hostel too. Different types of labs are present, like microbiology labs, plant tissue culture labs, etc. The library is well maintained with a variety of books. You can issue a book for 14 days. Classrooms have smart boards. Seminar rooms and smart rooms are also present.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This department is progressing in our college.

content.Placements: As far as my knowledge, there have been no placements in this course for the past 4-5 years. But if the whole batch requests for the recruiting companies to Dean then some ways may appear. Krivco, and Kisan Pro are some of the examples of recruiting companies during the placements era. As I know, Rs. 10,000- Rs. 50,000 salary packages are common.
content.Infrastructure: Our department is continuing to improve its infrastructure and provide practical labs for Tissue culture, Microbiology, Molecular Biology, and some others. It also owns a library which remains closed maximum times but if possible it is a proper place to utilise the gap period. Unfortunately, there's no Wi-Fi or I haven't identified its Wi-Fi in the department. Classrooms are average, some have defective fans while some have defective benches. There is a smart classroom also but there's is no switch to the inverter or generator during power off. The quality of facilities in our hostel is better than expected. There's a proper eye on hygiene and taste of foods in the mess. The canteen contains very few listed items. Medical facilities are average as there is a dispensary and many students do not find the right option to choose it. Sports and games are also available such as table tennis, shotput, race, kho-kho, etc.

Roles offered are quality assurance, agricultural researcher, genetic therapy biotechnology, recombinant DNA, bioinformatics, vaccine development.
content.Infrastructure: We have well-equipped laboratories. They help to gain more skills for industrial purposes. We have well-equipped hybrid classrooms. They are sanitised. Teh campus has Wi-Fi. We have a centralised library. The hostel is well-maintained. It provides drinking water. It has a pleasant environment. The hostel is surrounded by lush green forests and rivers. The quality of the food is average. CCTV cameras are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for biotechnology.

content.Placements: Our college provides placements. There are 60 seats in the biotech but admitted students till the latest batch are around 40-45. After doing B.Tech, it is very rare to get higher packages. You have to select M.tech to get high salary packages. Our university provides placements on campus. The salary package offered is around 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Most of the students go for further higher studies. If you do the M.tech in the field of biotechnology, then the salary package will be around 40 LPA - 50 LPA. Recruiting drug companies like Sun Pharma, etc. There are internship programs for students throughout the course. Microsoft and Infosys visit our college for internships. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Nothing more special other than the above-mentioned details.

content.Placements: About 60% of students are placed with a minimum package of INR 8 lacs. The students are trained in a way that makes them employable not only in agriculture but also in other sectors like banks, agri-business management, research, marketing, teaching, and many more. Recent selections of students were in companies such as Mother Dairy, Annapurna Finance, Satya Micro Capital, Pradaan, Reliance, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are too good, and facilities are available. Proper medical facilities are there. Food quality in the mess and canteen is good, as is proper team management in the mess. The infrastructure of the department is nice; Wi-Fi is available; proper lab work is done; all chemicals and necessary items are available. A proper silent library for study is available; many books are available, and Wi-Fi is also available. The library system is totally good.

overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Alard College of Engineering and Management are M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech. individual_reviews.title: Absolutely college is best and campus is very good.

content.Placements: A total of 70% of students are placed in this college. 50% in the tech field and 20% in non-technical fields. The highest package is approximately 24 LPA, and the lowest is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Amazon, Skybags, Wipro, TCS, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Alard College provides high-speed Wi-Fi in classrooms, powerful PCs in labs, large and well-furnished classrooms, and a spacious library with many chairs, tables, and racks. The library contains thousands of books related to engineering, history, and general knowledge.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of hostel is good. But daily cleaning is not available. The mess food is not healthy. Many hostellers have faced food poisoning. The fee is Rs 1,20,000. Library is also a good place to study but not available during lectures. Wi-Fi is available in library and admission cell.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Alard College of Engineering and Management.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for students.

The hostel facility and canteen are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Alard College of Engineering and Management.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the hostel and classroom is not satisfactory. The campus is not good.

The Hostel facilities are very bad.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for teaching but not for placements.

reviews.review_heading: There is good placement, good infrastructure, well management team and well campus placement team.

admission_process.title: Sunrise University Admissions Process 2025

paragraphs: Sunrise University admissionsare merit-based. The university conducts an entrance test for admission to PhD courses.Sunrise Universityoffers varied undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral-level programs in the fields of Teaching and education, Mass Communication and Media, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, Arts, Engineering, Law, Commerce, and IT and software.

The university offers admission to candidates considering their merit in the last qualifying exam. Besides, aspirants applying for PhD have to pass the entrance exam conducted by the university. Below areSunrise University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Sunrise admission criteria is a multi-step procedure. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the steps mentioned below to understand theSunrise University admission process:
STEP 1: Sunrise University Application Process 2025
To apply for admission to University, candidates need to fill out the online application form available on the university's website. They can also download or collect the form from the campus.
STEP 2: Selection

The university evaluates the applications of the candidates for educational qualification. The merit of the candidate's in the previous qualifying exam is considered for admission. For PhD, the university conducts an entrance test.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

After the candidates submit their applications, the university reviews them and makes an admission decision. They are informed of the decision via email or the university website. Further, aspirants have to pay theSunrise University feeto confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Does Sun Rise University accept CAT score ?
faqs.answer: No, Sun Rise University doen't accept CAT score. The eligibility criteria for MBA in Sun Rise Univerity isUndergraduate Degree with 40% aggregateAccepting Exams:CBSE 12th.Total tuition fees for this course is around 80k - 3 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Sc course to attempt Rajasthan JET Agriculture exam?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed their Senior Secondary (Class 12) examination from the Board of Secondary Education Rajasthan, Ajmer, or other recognised statutory boards are considered eligible for attempting JET in Agriculture. The eligible subject combinations will be:AgricultureBiologyChemistryMathematicsPhysicsThese combinations can again be depicted as ABC, PCM, PCB, PCMB, PCA, etc. To appear for the test, candidates must have passed all these subjects in Science or Agriculture streams with a minimum specified marks requirement, which usually is 50% for general categories and 45% for reserved categories.

paragraphs: Sun Rise University Faqs:

tables.context: What job profiles can I apply for in the governmen
data: Government Job Profiles for BSc Graduates

faqs.question: How can I get a job after completing BA?
faqs.answer: You'll have countless career options after your BA, so here's the list: Giving government exams i.e. giving UPSC, SSC and Banking exam. Pursuing a career in law field- It'll take another 3 years. Fashion/Interior Designing- I do not have much knowledge about how to go about this, but you can definitely go with this Translator- French, German, Spanish and what not are available for BA. You just need to select the correct college which offers you different languages. Psychologist- Sadly, this option is only open if you've taken psychology as your major. Economist- Again, if you opted for economics as a major in BA. But I have a few friends who aspire to become economists. Historian- Same thing again. Journalist- Currently, electronic media is everything. Film Industry- We all know that Bollywood is not all about actors. You have a lot of people working. There are directors, makeup artists, editors, etc. You can join the sales department of a firm. You can also pursue MBA and get a good job.

faqs.question: What is the average salary after pursuing D Pharmacy course?
faqs.answer: Most organizations can offer a pay scale for DPharm fresh graduates from INR 3 Lacs to INR 4 lakh per annum. Initially, new joiner will keep training or probation position, after which their pay scale would be revised. Post that new employees can find a salary in range of INR 5 Lacs - INR 7 Lacs. After gaining experience or higher education qualifications, a person can become a Pharmaceutical Executive or Laboratory Scientist whereby their salary would be in range of INR 7 Lacs - INR 9 lakh. Hence, it is a fruitful career option that has good salary pay scales with additional perks.

faqs.question: What are the career options available after completing a BCom degree course?
faqs.answer: BCom course is the gateway to job opportunities in several fields such as Accounting, Finance, Economics, Taxation, Insurance, etc. One can become an Accountant, Financial Analyst, Auditor, etc. after graduating with a BCom degree. This degree is also beneficial to those students who want to run their own businesses. Because of the variety of work prospects it gives, BCom is one of the most popular undergraduate educational programmes. Commerce is the nation's most important industry, and it has a huge impact on the economy. The expanding economy has resulted in a variety of job opportunities in the business sector. As a result, a Bachelor of Commerce degree can lead to a lucrative career.

faqs.question: What job profiles can I apply for in the government sector after completing B.Sc from Sunrise University?
faqs.answer: There are various job opportunities for BSc graduates in the government sector. Sunrise University BSc passouts can look for job notifications on the official website of the respective department. Mentioned below are some of the popular job profiles for BSc degree holders in the government sector: Government Job Profiles for BSc Graduates Research Scientist Clinical Research Specialist Lab Technician Assistant Nurse Forest Department- IFS Officer Biochemist FCI- Trainee RBI Grade B Officer SBI PO

I am satisfied with the hostel. The food served in the hostel is good and hygienic. The hostel rooms are equipped with beds, lockers, and washrooms. Sports and games are conducted in our college.

reviews.review_heading: University is good and campus is green.
reviews.review_text: The university's infrastructure is excellent. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are in good working order. The library is filled with books and is very peaceful. On campus, there are numerous sports facilities. The hostel is in good condition, but very few students stay here because the majority of students are locals. The mess is clean, and the food is adequate.

reviews.review_heading: Review for B.Com doing college of Sunrise University .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is huge and the central library is available with the good books. All the facilities like Wi-Fi connection, laboratory, grounds and annual fest available in our campus. Quality of the food our canteen is also hygienic and having variety.

reviews.review_heading: College and faculty members are good, and it is worth for getting admission.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available for all courses. Classrooms are well-established, and the library has one of the best collections in Alwar. Quality of the hostel is very good, and they provide good food and accommodation. They also provide medical facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Sunrise University Alwar is located in a village which is 20 km away from Alwar city.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi service was available, and we also had highly constructed practical labs. The mess served different types of food like rice, roti and dal. The food menu changed every week. The environment on the campus was good t live. Every year, games and events were held.

reviews.review_heading: The staff members were good during our course duration, i.e., from the academic year 2014-2017.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was average. Wi-Fi facility was not available. Commerce students don't need a lab. Classrooms were average, and the library was pretty good with Wi-Fi and other facilities. Hostel rooms were average, but the food served was good as compared to government universities. The canteen was also good and had a stationery shop in it. The medical facility provided was also good, and the university had a large playground with lots of sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Overall for study this university is very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this university is very big with a ground. The Wi-Fi medical and sports facilities is very amazing they also have a big classrooms. Library is also there with many books the quality of classrooms and labs are very nice, food quality is not so good but they have a huge range. Hostel rooms is okay.

reviews.review_heading: A good college to learn and improve your skills in any field a person wants to grow his/her career.
reviews.review_text: We were provided with good facilities. Labs, classrooms, library and all facilities are upto date with projectors in every classroom. We have a canteen which provides good quality food for every student and faculty members. Sports and games classes were provided to all the students including the faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Average college because of the type of placements offered.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi networks are available for most of the times in college. The college classroom are spacious but air flow or ventilation is low. The sports field is available and sports equipment are also available. First aid kit is available in the college. Certain insurance policy is available for the students of college.

reviews.review_heading: The college has helpful faculty and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is good. Every classroom is spacious. The garden of college is greenery with different plants as well as with trees. You can also get labs facilities in college. There were different labs for each subject. About medical and sports facilities, the university has medical rooms for the students for an emergency like kits and all.

reviews.review_heading: This university admission for only accepts money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is out of the area in Alwar district. Nobody lives here. There are farmers only. There is no transport that can reach the college. There is no other education department in that area. So can't take admission in the university. Sunrise university is fake.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and students and staffs.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college very minimalistic and vibrant Wi-Fi networks are everywhere in college. There is big ground in the entrance back side is playing field. Food quality of canteen was good and hostel rooms were very good maintenance we didn't face any issues while residing in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: If you are in Alwar, then this is the place to go.
reviews.review_text: There is no on-campus Wi-Fi facility for the students. There are various labs on the campus as per the requirements of the courses being offered by the college. The college provides the medical facilities and sports as well. The labs are fully equipped, but only 20% of the classes have the projectors installed. The food quality is good, but only limited variety is kept. I have never been in the hostel.

The faculty are passionate and committed to helping the students in their career pathways. They engage the students with the latest activities and innovate teaching and quality research.

highlights.summary: The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies courses are offered to students in Full Time mode.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and placements.

review_content.Placements: I am currently pursuing B.Tech 3rd year in Computer Science and Engineering at RGUKT Basar. According to the last year’s placement scenario, 75 percent of students from Computer Science and Engineering get placed in various software companies like Provakil, Wipro, and TCS. Around 10% of students receive the highest package of 14 LPA, and 50% receive the lowest package of up to 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have labs to do our experiments, and we are also provided laptops in the 1st year. We have very good mess facilities, hospital, and Student Activity Center (SAC) to play games. We also have Wi-Fi in both boys’ and girls’ hostels. Coming to our mess menu, they provide all varieties of tiffins, meals, snacks, and sick food too. We also have 24/7 hospital facility with an ambulance, including a medical shop.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Our campus is a hub of innovation.

review_content.Placements: For the 2025 batch, the placement rate was 60%. The highest package is 15LPA, the lowest is 4-6LPA, and the average is 8LPA. ML, AI, full stack, and Data Analytics are the top courses offered. Top recruiting companies are Hugo Save, Solutions, Autocracy, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department has a number of qualified teachers who encourage the students to get engaged in several extra-curricular and co-curricular activities for them to be successful engineers. The Computer Science and Engineering Department provides students with laptops, campus-wide Wi-Fi, and well-equipped labs and libraries. Our campus also has digital and central libraries that are fully enabled with Wi-Fi, allowing for online research and projects. Our campus has separate hostels for boys and girls with a capacity of 8000 students, equipped with Wi-Fi and a bed with a mattress. The mess serves veg and non-veg meals during specific timings. They serve nutritious food.

review_summary.college_name: RGUKT (IIIT Basara) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Faculty are average and there are average placements. Good for rural background students.

content.Placements: More no. of students are placed in the CSE branch. There are less placements for other branches. We have to prepare for other government exams by ourselves managing both academic and preparation is quite difficult, but the highest package of our branch last year is 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, hostel, food and labs are good. Classrooms are also average. The food can be improved by upgrading the menu which provides proteins and nutrients otherwise the food is average. Hostel facilities are not as good as other colleges. Sports and games are also encouraged.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty.

content.Placements: 60 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 15 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. Most of the students got internships. Most of the companies coming here are software companies. The average package in software is 6 LPA. We also have T&P.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel rooms can accommodate a huge number of students. The rooms are very big and have many facilities. There are three playgrounds. Our college has 4 mess. Our campus is built on 276 acres. There are 3 hostels for girls and 3 hostels for boys.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027

individual_reviews.title: Our campus is a hub of innovation.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good to join the campus for study and placements.

content.Placements: Presently, I am in 3rd year of the B.Tech in computer science and engineering. On our campus, the highest package is 15 LPA to 17 LPA, and the average is approximately 5 LPA. Nearly 70% of the batch students are placed every year on our campus. Wipro, Provakil, etc., will visit our campus for recruitment yearly.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our campus are really good. We have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and 24X7 library access. We also have separate laptops for each. We also have Wi-Fi facility in our hostels too. All the classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, benches, fans, and other infrastructure.

admission_overview.college_name: RGUKT (IIIT Basara) Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: RGUKT (IIIT Basara) : Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies admission 2025 is merit-based. It offers courses to candidates at both the UG and PG levels. These include- BTech and MTech. Both of these courses are offered in multiple specialisations at the university. RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies has three residential campuses located at Basar, Nuzvid, and R K Valley in Telangana. Currently, the Basar campus of RGUKT is the only one operating in the state of Telangana, as per the official website of the university.

eligibility_selection.title: RGUKT (IIIT Basara) Eligibility and Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies eligibility varies from course to course. However, the selection criteria remain the same, since admissions to all courses are merit-based. Candidates must pass Class 10 to apply for UG courses, and a graduation degree is required for PG courses in any stream. Below are RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: -

courses_table.eligibility: Pass Class 10/SSC or any other equivalentexaminations in the first attempt, in 2025, from any recognized board
Pass graduation with a valid score from a recognised university/institute

faqs.answer: Yes, you are eligible for admission in (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies with 80% in Class 10. Since,  80% is a good score you can get admission in the university. Ensure to submit the valid marksheet and certificate for Class 10 to apply for and confirm your admission at RGUKT.

Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees.

courses_data.name: RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The university offers a 6 years B.E. / B.Tech course at the UG level in different specialisations, such as Chemical Engineering, Materials Science and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Candidates interested in applying should make sure they fulfil the specific eligibility requirements listed by the university. Candidates can check below the details of the requirements forRGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies B.E. / B.Tech:

faqs.question: What is the duration of BTech course at RGUKT (IIIT Basara)?
faqs.answer: The duration of BTech course at RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies is six years. The course is divided into pre-university and Engineering course. For the initial two years, the pre-university course is taught to candidates and after this for the rest four years the Engineering course starts. Candidates can check the official website of the university for more details on the same.

faqs.question: What all specialisations are offered under BTech course in RGUKT (IIIT Basara)?
faqs.answer: RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies offers BTech course in various specialisations. These include- Chemical Engineering,  Civil Engineering,  Computer Science and Engineering,  Electrical Engineering,  Electronics and Communications Engineering,  Materials Science and Metallurgical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering. All these are offered for a six year duration and in full-time mode.

faqs.question: Can my application form get rejected for BTech course at RGUKT (IIIT Basara)?
faqs.answer: Yes,the application form for RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies BTech admission can be rejected if the details filled by the candidate are incorrect. It can also be rejected if the candidate has not uploaded the correct documents required like marksheets, certificates, ID proofs, etc. One possible reason is also if the candidate doesn't qualify the eligibility criteria.

courses_data.name: RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies M.E./M.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies admissions are on a merit basis and students need not appear for any entrance test. The duration of the programme is 2 years. Eligible candidates can submit the required documents and register for the course. Below is the eligibility to join RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies:

faqs.question: How many specialisations can I choose from in M.Tech at RGUKT (IIIT Basara)?
faqs.answer: RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies offers three specialisations under M.Tech course to the candidates. These include- Computer Science and Engineering,  Electronics and Communication Engineering, and Computational Mechanics in Mechanical Engineering. Candidates can choose the one which best suits their interest and apply for the same online on the official website or offline by contacting the admission office of the university.

faqs.question: Is M.Tech available at RGUKT (IIIT Basara)?
faqs.answer: Yes, RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies offers M.Tech course in various specialisations to candidates. The duration for this course is two years and it is offered in full-time mode at the university. Candidates must ensure fullfilling the eligibility criteria before applying for admission to avoid rejection of the application form. Admissions to this course are merit-based.

faqs.question: How much time does it take to confirm admission at RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies?
faqs.answer: After filling the application form of RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, candidate's applications are reviewed and if they qualify the eligibility and selection criteria, admission is granted. However, the time frame for application review and admission confirmation is not officially communicated by the university.

reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi in the hostels. All the branch related labs are available. There is a digital library and central library. Every class consists of 60 members. There is a hospital which is available for 24/7. Every year, annual games are conducted in our college.

reviews.review_heading: You will love RGUKT Basara forever.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is good, but there is no Wi-Fi available. Overall, the facilities are good and meet basic needs. The labs are the best and the equipment in the labs is also good. Classrooms are good. We have a digital library and a central library with a maximum number of books covered. The hostel facilities are not good, they don't clean the rooms and bathroom properly. Hostel infrastructure is too old and the food quality is just average. Medical support is good. Sports and ga...

reviews.review_heading: My Journey at Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technology.
reviews.review_text: In my department, labs are good but some of the apparatus is only in good condition. Many of the machines are not working. As I am in the VLSI lab now, computers are good but some are not working. But the faculty members explained it in a good manner. Quality of the food is average. We don't have any canteen on the campus. We have a hospital on campus. Sports and games are encouraged at this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities in sports compared to other facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not very good. In each hostel room, 3 members should stay. It is very difficult to stay 3 members in the hostel. The quality of the food was average. We have high-quality sports facilities. In the canteen, products available are very limited. We didn't have Wi-Fi in our hostels. Labs and classrooms are maintained clean. We have a library which consists of all types of books.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about RGUKT (IIIT Basara): Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies

The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur offers Degree courses including 8 UG and 6 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. The highest salary package offered is around 10 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average is likely around 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Hexaware, Virtusa, and Infosys. faqs.answer: Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theNri Institute Of Technology, Gunturapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG and After 10th programmes in fields of Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software, and more. To know about the eligibility of Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur courses, students can visit the website.

Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur admission:

reviews.review_heading: A college between average and good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course/department include good Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and  library. The quality of the facilities in my hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our NRI Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our college are very good. In our college, the Wi-Fi is provided to the entire campus. We have a canteen in our college, and all items and food are available in our canteen. We have a library with a lot of books, and they are very helpful for the students in our college. In our college, the hostel facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: College monents in the life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and the hostel maintenance have been good compared to the others. It provides a bus facility to travel from the hostel to the college. The infrastructure in the college is also better to have a great piece of mind. So there is no chance for disturbance.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college in the state with good faculty and facilities for students.
reviews.review_text: My college is eco-friendly. Different departments have separate blocks. Labs are present in every block. The food quality is very good in my college. The hostel quality is above average. There is no Wi-Fi in my college, and only the Airtel network works in the campus surroundings.

reviews.review_heading: Nri Institute of Technology - The power house of technology.
reviews.review_text: The college environment is very good. The infrastructure is very nice. The labs are advanced with new servers. We have a digital library. Now our college management is constructing a new advanced block with good facilities. We have a hygiene canteen and their food is average.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent infrastructure, industry-relevant curriculum, and strong placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: My college offers high-speed Wi-Fi across the campus, including classrooms, labs, and common areas. Computer labs are equipped with high-performance computers with modern processors and need necessary software like Python, R, MYSQL, Jupiter Notebooks, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a limited number of placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. Classrooms are very spacious. Library is also good. The quality of food is also very satisfying. No medical facilities are provided in our college. Sports are not conducted in college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nri Institute Of Technology, Guntur.
reviews.review_text: Our college hostel is very good, and infrastructure is like a double-bedroom flat. Food and transport facilities are very good. The food has a slightly different taste, and there are no libraries in the hostel. But, there are labs and a library in our college, a peaceful library, and very nice labs.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with our college faculty, TNP department(Training and Placement), Good canteen.
reviews.review_text: There are many computer labs in our college. As an ECE student, we have a VLSI lab, EDC lab, MPMC lab, and IoT labs with a large number of classrooms and a large library. We have peaceful weather in the library. The facilities are very good in our college. The hostel is very good in our college with spacious rooms and quality food they are providing in our hostel. There are medical facilities available at mid-time also and regarding games, only on Sundays they will permit us to play games.

reviews.review_heading: About my college life and the facilities and the infrastructure of the college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. Very good & clean maintenance of classrooms, washrooms, libraries, labs, and academics is there. There is a small field, but no guidance is given for any of the sports. The food is good and healthy. There is a need to increase the number of qualified professors to make a good understanding of each and every concept.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely Satisfying because of Best faculty members, Good Placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: Our labs are excellent. Wi-Fi connection is also good. In the library, 2500+ volumes are there. Our college canteen food is also excellent. Canteen food is also provided to college hostel students. The quality of the food is excellent. But sometimes, rarely, food quality changes.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nri Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. Labs are average. The library is available for students and it is in good condition. The hostel facility is available in our college. The food served in the hostel is good. The atmosphere of our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nri Institute Of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good but not up to the mark. Some labs are working but does not have sufficient equipment. Library is good in our college which is pleasant and very peaceful.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities and infrastructure are good. Laboratory is well-maintained. Our classrooms we good, and it also provides a library. The food served in the mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with staff and fellow students but disappointed with placements and college ground.
reviews.review_text: NRIIT college contains 3 blocks for different years and a library. Wi-Fi is not available in our college for students. There are 3 computer labs for CSE students, a workshop for mechanical students and a core lab for civil students. Classrooms are neat and clean with suitable lighting and air. The hostel for girls is not recommended because of its infrastructure and cleanliness. The food served is average in both hostel and canteen. The playground is not in a proper way to play games. The entire...

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the North East Frontier Technical University:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, North East Frontier Technical University offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and Executive MBA/PGDM. The North East Frontier Technical University course fee ranges between INR 7,500 to 3,20,000.

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for the BTech at North East Frontier Technical University (NEFTU), candidates must have completed Class 12 with a science stream. Selection is based on marks obtained in national-level entrance exams like JEE or through the university's own entrance examination process.

review_content.Placements: Almost 55% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA. overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: What documents are required for BCom admission at NEFTU?
faqs.answer: Documents usually include Class 10 and 12 mark sheets, a passport-size photo, valid ID proof, a transfer or migration certificate, and a caste certificate (if applicable). All documents must be uploaded as per the format mentioned on the NEFTU website during the BCom application.

faqs.question: Is BBA admission at NEFTU merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: BBA admission at North East Frontier Technical University is strictly merit-based. The university does not conduct an entrance exam. Selection is based only on the candidate's performance in Class 12 from a recognised board, preferably in the commerce stream

placement_report.college_name: North East Frontier Technical University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: NEFTU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: North East Frontier Technical University has not released the official placement report for 2023. As per the data gathered from Shikshs students' reviews, almost 55% of students were placed in recent years. Further, the highest package and average package offered during NEFTU placements were INR 6 LPA and INR 3.50 LPA , respectively. Cognizant, Capgemini, DXC Technology, and many other renowned companies offered job opportunities.

tables.context: How is the placement at NEFTU?

faqs.question: How is the placement at NEFTU?
faqs.answer: The placement report or brochure is not out on the official website. As per the details gathered from unofficial sources, 55% of students get placed every year. The highest package and average package offered over the past few years were INR 6 LPA and INR 3.50 LPA, respectively. Check the complete insights of NEFTU placements from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics the highest package INR 6 LPA Average package INR 3.50 LPA the lowest package INR 2.50 LPA Placement rate 55% NOTE: The above statistics are fetched from the Shiksha students' reviews.

faqs.question: What is the highest paying job in Tourism?
faqs.answer: Food and Beverage Director and General Manager of a premier international hotel chain hold highest earning position in Tourism industry. Food & Beverage Director is responsible for managing all parts of organization's food and beverage planning and service like - menu planning costing preparing and presenting food and beverages adhering to quality and safety requirements

hostel_campus.college_name: North East Frontier Technical University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Review of North East Frontier Technical University.
reviews.review_text: Our labs were not well-maintained. Our library and classrooms were spacious. Hostels were average. The sports ground was good. The food served in the canteen was good.

reviews.review_heading: This College is best for my education.
reviews.review_text: Labs, library are the main places we spend time in our free hours, the whole campus has free Wi-Fi network, hostel facilites are not good though wardens are strict and they usually makes argue with other state students northidian people are very bad in hostels they always ought with us.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing place for students who want to make a successful career..
reviews.review_text:
All the facilities are available. 
The campus is fully covered by CCTV.  
Wi-Fi is available.
The library is huge and the atmosphere is friendly. 
There is a canteen on the campus. 
The study room is well furnished and clean. The sitting arrangement is amazing. Everyone gets a private area to study without any disturbance.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Think before taking admission twice.

review_content.Placements: Placements are fake. No any reputed company comes here for campus interviews. We were placed in a startup company saying it will pay 15000 but paid only 5000 for 2 months of lots of efforts. This college have no future if you depend on college campus for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Transport facility is the worst. Other facilities like lab, library etc. Are same as other colleges but canteen is not good. Wi-Fi is not provided. Labs have some of computers out of use. Do not have all proper equipment in labs like extra LAN cable. Library don't have proper book record as well as book with extra knowledge than engineering. Limited stock we can say.

overview_faqs.question: Is Prerana Pratishthan's Universal College of Engineering and Research a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Prerana Pratishthan's Universal College of Engineering and Research is a reputed institute for B.Tech, After 1th Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Prerana Pratishthan's Universal College of Engineering and Research has a review rating of 2 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 1.8 on campuslife, 1.1 on placements, 2.3 on faculty and 2.2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Prerana Pratishthan's Universal College of Engineering and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good teaching quality and new study equipment.

content.Placements: Placements in our college were very poor. Only 2% of the students were recruited through campus selection, and most of the companies recruiting were IT companies. The average salary package offered was 2 LPA. Many courses had a lack of recruiting process that shows the poor placement of college. It was working hard for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities provided by our college were good. Most of the equipment was new and well maintained for courses. Food quality was good and hygienic in many ways. Sports activities were played every year. Our college was improving in many aspects.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college is improving.

content.Placements: Placements are not provided by college till now. Students do not take admissions as the college is very far from the city, and the quality of education is also poor. Many students from this college got an internship. According to placements, the college needs to improve. I suggest students who are from a poor family background can take admission here.
content.Infrastructure: The environment of the college is awesome, and there is a hostel in the college campus. There are many problems like there is no good mess, range problems, transportation problem, etc. There is no range available inside college for any sim card. Our college is improving nowadays, but there is no value for sports. They don't show any interest in sports activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Think before taking admission twice.

content.Placements: Placements are fake. No any reputed company comes here for campus interviews. We were placed in a startup company saying it will pay 15000 but paid only 5000 for 2 months of lots of efforts. This college have no future if you depend on college campus for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Transport facility is the worst. Other facilities like lab, library etc. Are same as other colleges but canteen is not good. Wi-Fi is not provided. Labs have some of computers out of use. Do not have all proper equipment in labs like extra LAN cable. Library don't have proper book record as well as book with extra knowledge than engineering. Limited stock we can say.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Prerana Pratishthan's Universal College of Engineering and Research college review.

content.Placements: The placements are not available here. No one placed in the previous year. They give you calls of different companies, but it's up to your knowledge and skills to get hired. Besides, these days, very few companies approach the college, especially for mechanical engineering.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is average, but not best. You can look for another college if you want a good infrastructure. Before taking admission, I suggest you go and see for yourself. As it is only 5 to 6 years old, the labs are not that bad and they are in good condition.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The college is not good as compared to the university.

content.Placements: There are no placement drives in this college. This college is not good. Fewer facilities. 2% of the students get placed. Fewer students got an internship from college. The placement cell is available. I don't know about stipend during the internship.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi facility in this college. The classrooms are good, good quality labs are available, and no medical facilities. Sports and games are conducted only in annual events. The canteen facilities are available in this college, and the quality of food is quite good. College is far away from the city and situated in a hilly area.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Prerana Pratishthan's Universal College of Engineering and Research.
reviews.review_text: The college has ten buildings, which has the first administrative section building, and the engineering consists civil, computer, mechanical, electrical, electronics department, also has Diploma, HSC, pharmacy. The office section is supportive for us. The admin section and the scholarship section always tried to collaborate with the student and give something to our students as well. The faculty members of this college are on average good, and not so good as well. The politics have been found in...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the placements in 2016.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Wi-Fi is provided in limited areas and that too in only break timings. The classroom and library are good. Hostels are available for girls and boys. But canteen quality is not good. One of the biggest problems is, the college is located away from the city. So, many facilities like xerox, book stationary, saloon and market are not available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is bad regarding the education, infrastructure, placements, and facilities provided.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is bad, and all the ceilings are leaked. No one is allowed to go on the terrace. There is no safety, and the roof may fall at any time. No one should take the admission in this college, and it is not safe for the children to sit in that college. The buses provided by the college are old, and they stop working on the highway any time which causes the risk of an accident. The rainwater enters the bus in the rainy season.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed with placements and infrastructure of the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not much good. The climate on the campus during the rainy season is very exciting. The library is very small. The study environment was not healthy. The study room was kept locked most of the time. Wi-Fi facility was not provided for the students.

review_content.Placements: 80% got placed through campus and rest all got some or the other job. The lowest was 4 Lacs and the highest was 6 Lacs. Average lies between 5 Lacs -5.5 Lacs. Everyone got the internship from college. Some of them were paid and rest of them were unpaid.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are one the best in the country right now. Due to covid everything is shift to online mode but still our department found a way to conduct online labs. faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is good as per hostel fee for a year is Rs 48,000 which includes 4 times meal at the specified time. overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Rajshree Institute of Management and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It offers good faculty support and decent placements for the BBA students.

content.Placements: I am from the BBA course. In my college, around 65-75 percent of students got placed through campus recruitment (varies year to year). The highest package ranges from 6-8 LPA. The average package ranges from 2.5-3.5 LPA. The lowest package ranges from 1-3 LPA. Companies visit the college for placements. Roles offered are mostly entry-level, but they are helpful for starting a career.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is enabled with 24x7 Wi-Fi accessible in academic buildings, the library, and common areas. The speed is decent for academic tasks, online research, and project work. Labs are available depending on the course. Hostel rooms are clean and properly furnished. It has adequate lighting, fans, charging points, and basic amenities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: College is very beautiful, and the facilities are very good.

content.Placements: 60% of students are placed in our course. The highest package is very good at 6 LPA,, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Top companies hire and recruit for this course. Internships are done by 30 to 40% of students, and HR roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good, and Wi-Fi is available on the campus. Labs are very good, classrooms are very clean, and the library has a very good atmosphere. Facilities in the hostel are very good, including food and rooms. The canteen and medical facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: LL.B - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's a very good college. The facilities, faculty members, and all are very good and impressive.

content.Placements: The number of students placed is about 70-80%. The highest average package is 5 LPA - 6 LPA. The lowest salary is 2 LPA - 3 LPA. There are many companies that recruit students. Percentage of students passing every year is 100%. Roles offered are advocate, lawyer, judiciary, legal advisory, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, smart class, moot courts, laboratories, botanical garden, and many more are available. The food quality in the hostel is very good. Healthy and tasty food is preserved. Medical facilities are also available. Campus has its own hospital free for students. Many types of sports are available. Indoor and outdoor games are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.A LL.B - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Rajshree Institute at a glance.

content.Placements: Institute comes under the umbrella of Rajshree Group of Institutions Bareilly. The placement cell of the institute provides 100% placement assistance to its students. The highest package offered is 23 LPA and the average package offered is 15 LPA. Some potential employers include IBM, Wipro, Microsoft, L&T, Nokia Solutions & Network, Reliance Jio, Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is good as per hostel fee for a year is Rs 48,000 which includes 4 times meal at the specified time. You have 24/7 Wi-Fi facility available in hostel room as well as college campus with an average speed of around 300 kbps. The menu of the mess is created by student. The registration Process is done in registrar office. Gym facility is also available. Rented rooms, PG, and outside hostel are also available at a distance of 2 km from the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college is average in all facilities. They provide every facility and faculty members are good.

content.Placements: Around 20-25% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5.5 LPA. Recruiting companies are PhonePe, Reliance, and many more. Around 10-15% of students got internships. Top roles offered in my course are manager of the company and employer.
content.Infrastructure: The available facilities are average for a good student. Wi-Fi of our college is the worst. But the labs are good, and classrooms are good. Library is neat and clean and very silent. Hostel facilities are good. Mess and canteen are good for food. Other things like sports and games are amazing.

paragraphs: Rajshree Institute of Management and Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in streams includingEngineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Mass Communication and Media, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science, Teaching and Education, Animation and Beauty and Fitness.Rajshree Institute of Management and Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, CUET, and CUET-PG. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 2,250 - 2,44,800for UG, PG and After 10th level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 2 years - 4 years.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.
